info.name: Trivazo — Full User/Customer API v1
info.description:
Complete user/customer-side REST API for Trivazo.
Base URL: {{base_url}}/api/v1

Setup:
1. Set 'base_url' = http://localhost:8000 in your environment
2. Use Auth > Login to auto-save token
3. All protected endpoints use: Authorization: Bearer {{auth_token}}

item.name: 01 — Auth
item.description: User registration, login, OTP verification, forgot password, social login.

exec: if (res.token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('auth_token', res.token); pm.test('Has token', () => pm.expect(res.token).to.be.a('string')); }

formdata.value: My order #123 has not been delivered yet.
Please update me on the status.

item.name: 20 — Chat
item.description: Chat with sellers and delivery men. Requires auth:api.

item.name: 24 — CarPool (Passenger)
item.description: Complete CarPool user API. Public + auth:api protected routes.
